sourceDesc.p: Derived from CDSL MW, PWG, PWK, AP90, GRA, and FRI source records for interoperability analysis.

projectDesc.p: tei-archival-profile-v0.1; TEI is used as the archival/textual model. Raw CDSL records are preserved as escaped source-entry quotes, while selected lexical structures are promoted into TEI entry, form, sense, citation, and relation elements.

revisionDesc.change: Included in the full machine-reviewed TEI profile.

listBibl.head: Machine-extracted citation index; source quotes preserve the archival text.

cit.quote: <L>4782<pc>24,1<k1>an<k2>an<h>2<e>1 <hom>2.</hom> <s>an</s> ¦ <ab>cl.</ab> 2. <ab>P.</ab> <s>a/niti</s> or <s>a/nati</s>, <s>Ana</s>, <s>anizyati</s>, <s>A/nIt</s> [<ls>RV. x, 129, 2</ls>], to breathe, respire, gasp; <div n="to"/>to live, <ls>L.</ls>; <div n="to"/>to move, go, <ls>L.</ls> [<ab>cf.</ab> <lang>Gk.</lang> <gk>ἄνεμος</gk> <lang>Lat.</lang> <etym>animus</etym>] : <div n="vp"/><ab>Caus.</ab> <s>Anayati</s>: <div n="vp"/><ab>Desid.</ab> <s>aninizati</s>.<info whitneyroots="an,3"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp="2P"/> <LEND>

<L>2199<pc>1-0164<k1>an<k2>an<h>2
2. {#an#}¦, {#a/niti#}
<ls>P. 7,2,76.</ls> {#a/nati#} (der Ton ruht in den Specialformen bald auf der 1sten, bald auf der 2ten Silbe)
<ls>AV. 4,4,3.</ls> {#a/nyate#}
<ls>DHĀTUP. 26,66.</ls> <ab>imperf.</ab> {#AnIt#} <ab>od.</ab> {#Anat#}
<ls>P. 7,3,98.</ls> <ls n="P. 7,3,">99.</ls> {#Ana, anitA, anizyati, AnIt#} .
<div n="1"> 1) {%athmen%}
<ls>DHĀTUP. 24,62.</ls> <ls n="DHĀTUP.">26,66.</ls> {#AnI^davA\taM sva\DayA\ tadeka^m#}
<ls>ṚV. 10,129,1.</ls>
[Page1-0165]
{#ko hyevAnyAtkaH prARyAt . yadeza AkASa Anando na syAt#}
<ls>TAITT. UP. 2,7.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%nach Luft schnappen, lechzen%}: {#yaTA^ sma te vi\roha^to a\Bita^ptami\vAna^ti#}
<ls>AV. 4,4,3.</ls> {#a\nanneva prA\Ranpa\ridIrRaH SiSye#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 2,5,3,3.</ls> {#pa\ridIrRA a\natyaSca prA\RatyaSca SiSyiryare#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR. 2,5,">2,2.</ls>
<div n="1">— 3) {%gehen%}
<ls>NAIGH. 2,14.</ls> — <ab>Caus.</ab> {#Anayati#} . — <ab>Desid.</ab> {#aninizati#}
<ls>P. 6,1,3</ls>, <ls>Sch. 8,4,21</ls>,
<ab>Sch.</ab>
<div n="p">— {#apa#} {%ausathmen%}: {#a\ntaSca^rati roca\nAsya prA\RAda^pAna\tI#}
<ls>ṚV. 10,189,2.</ls> {#apA^nati\ prARa^ti\ puru^zo\ garBe^ anta\rA#}
<ls>AV. 11,6,14.</ls> <ls n="AV. 11,6,">7.</ls> {#yo 'pAnenApAniti sa ta AtmA sarvAntaraH#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 14,6,5,1.</ls> = <ls>BṚH. ĀR. UP. 3,4,1.</ls> {#yadvE prARiti sa prARo yadapAniti so 'pAnaH . — . tasmAdaprARannanapAnanvAcamaBivyAharati#}
<ls>CHĀND. UP. 1,3,3.</ls> {#tasmAdekameva vrataM caretprARyAccEvApAnyAcca#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 14,4,3,34.</ls> (= <ls>BṚH. ĀR. UP. 1,5,23.</ls>) {#muKena muKaM saMDAyABiprARyApAnyAt#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR. 14,">9,4,9.</ls> (= <ls>BṚH. ĀR. UP. 6,4,10.</ls>) {#muKena muKaM saMDAyApAnyABiprARyAt#} <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 14,9,4,">10.</ls> (= <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 14,9,4,">11.</ls>)
<div n="p">— {#aByapa#} {%anathmen%}: {#yadyapAnenAByapAnitam#}
<ls>AIT. UP. 3,11.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#ava#} {%einathmen%}: {#avA\niti#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 4,3,2,6.</ls> {#a\navAnan#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR. 4,">6,1,5.</ls> {#etAM di\Sama\navAnantsftvA\ kumBa\M prakzIyA\napekzamARa ehi#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">13,8,3,4.</ls> <ls>KĀTY. ŚR. 21,4,6.</ls> an der betreffenden Stelle: {#atavAnaM sftvA#} .
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#anavAnam#} .
<div n="p">— {#ud#}
<div n="1"> 1) {%hinaufathmen%}: {#uda\nannaByuda\niti#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 4,1,2,27.</ls> {#ya udAnenodaniti#}
(<ls>BṚH. ĀR. UP. 3,4,1</ls>: {#udAniti#}; <ab>vgl.</ab> <ab>u.</ab> {#an#} mit {#vi#}) {#sa ta AtmA sarvAntaraH#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">14,6,5,1.</ls> {#u\danyAt#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">4,6,1,7.</ls> {#udA^nizurma\hIriti\ tasmA^duda\kamu^cyate#}
<ls>AV. 3,13,4.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%ausathmen%}: {#imA\H prajA\H prARa\tyaScodana\tyaScAnta\rIkzama\nucaranti#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 3,8,3,2.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">4,1,2,16.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#aByud#} {%anathmen, anhauchen%}: {#amuM hyeva lokamuda\nannaByudaniti#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 4,1,2,27.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#upa#}, <ab>s.</ab> {#upAna#} .
<div n="p">— {#parA#}, {#parARiti#}
<ls>P. 8,4,19</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
— <ab>Caus.</ab> {#parARiRat#}
<ls n="P. 8,4,">21</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab> — <ab>Desid.</ab> {#parARiRizati#} <ab>ebend.</ab>
<div n="p">— {#pari#}, {#paryaniti#}
<ls>PAT.</ls> zu <ls>P. 8,4,19.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#pra#}, {#prARiti#}
<ls>P. 8,4,19</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
{#prARiti#} oder {#prAniti#}
<ls>VOP. 8,22.</ls> <ls n="VOP.">9,27.</ls> {#prARat#}
<ls>P. 7,3,99</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
<div n="1"> 1) {%einathmen%}: {#yatprARena na prARiti yena prARaH praRIyate#} (dem Sinne nach ein <ab>pass.</ab> von {#prAn#}; eine ähnliche Gleichstellung von {#an#} und {#nI#} wird man <ab>u.</ab> 3. finden)
<ls>KENOP. 8.</ls>
<ls>ŚAṂK.</ls> erklärt {#prARa#} durch {#GrARa#} und {#prARiti#} durch {%riechen.%} <ab>Vgl.</ab> noch <ab>u.</ab> dem <ab>simpl.</ab>, <ab>u.</ab> {#apa#} und <ab>u.</ab> {#ud#} .
<div n="1">— 2) {%athmen%}: {#mayA\ so anna^matti\ yo vi\paSya^ti\ yaH prARi^ti\ ya I^M Sf\Rotyu\ktam#}
<ls>ṚV. 10,125,4.</ls> {#yadvi\roca^te\ pra cAna^ti vi ca\ cazwe\ SacI^BiH#}
<ls>AV. 7,25,2.</ls> {#yacca prARiti yacca na#}
<ls>BṚH. ĀR. UP. 1,5,1.</ls> {#prARIt#}
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 15,102.</ls> {#prARizuH#}
<ls n="BHAṬṬ. 15,">108.</ls> {#yo viSva^sya\ jaga^taH prARa\taspati^H#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,101,5.</ls> {#yatprA\Ranni^mi\zacca\ yat#}
<ls>AV. 10,8,2.</ls> <ls n="AV.">11,2,10.</ls> <ls n="AV.">12,1,3.</ls> {#ejatprARannimizacca#}
<ls>MUṆḌ. UP. 2,2,1.</ls> {#prARa\ntaH prARena#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 14,9,2,8</ls>-<ls n="ŚAT. BR. 14,9,2,">12.</ls> = <ls>BṚH.</ls> <ls>AR. UP. 6,1,8-12.</ls>
<div n="1">— 3) {%wehen%}: {#vAyurvE praRIryajYAnAM yadA hi prARityaTa yajYo 'TAgnihotram#}
<ls>AIT. BR. 2,34.</ls>
<div n="1">— 4) {%leben%}: {#yena^ prA\Ranti^ vI\ruDa^H#}
<ls>AV. 1,31,1.</ls> <ls n="AV.">10,8,19.</ls> <ls n="AV. 10,">10,5.</ls> <ls n="AV.">11,6,10.</ls> <ls n="AV. 11,">9,23.</ls> <ls n="AV.">13,3,3.</ls> {#kaTaM prARimi durgataH#}
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 18,10.</ls> {#prARivastava mAnArTam#}
<ls n="BHAṬṬ.">4,38.</ls> {#na jijIvAsuKI tAtaH prARatA rahitastvayA#}
<ls n="BHAṬṬ.">14,58.</ls> {#na prARizi durAcAra#}
<ls n="BHAṬṬ.">9,57.</ls> {#prARa#}
<ls n="BHAṬṬ.">14,60.</ls> — <ab>Caus.</ab> {%athmen machen, beleben%}: {#yo mA\rayati^ prA\Raya^ti yasmA^tprA\Ranti\ Buva^nAni\ viSvA^#}
<ls>AV. 13,3,3.</ls> {#prARayantamarim#} (von {#prA˚#} abhängig)
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 9,101.</ls> {#prARiRat#}
<ls>P. 8,4,21</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
— <ab>Desid.</ab> {#prARiRizati#}
<ls>P. 6,1,3</ls>, <ls>Sch. 8,4,21</ls>,
<ab>Sch.</ab>
<div n="p">— {#anupra#} {%nachathmen, hinterher athmen%}: {#prARaM devA anuprARanti#}
<ls>TAITT. UP. 2,3.</ls>
[Page1-0166]
<div n="p">— {#aBipra#} {%beeinathmen%}: {#imAM#} ({%die Erde%}) {#hyeva prA\RannaBiprA\Riti#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 4,1,2,7.</ls> {#yadi prARenABiprARitam#}
<ls>AIT. UP. 3,11.</ls> {#sa yadDEnatprARenAgrahEzyadaBiprARya hEvAnnamatrapsyat#} 4; <ab>vgl.</ab> auch <ab>u.</ab> {#apa#} .
<div n="p">— {#vi#}
<div n="1"> 1) {%athmen%}: {#avya^nacca vya\nacca\ sasni^#}
<ls>ṚV. 10,120,2.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%den Athem durch den Körper durchathmen%}: {#vya\nannaBivya\niti#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 4,1,2,27.</ls> {#yo vyAnena vyaniti#}
(<ls>BṚH. ĀR. UP. 3,4,1</ls>: {#vyAniti#}; <ab>vgl.</ab> {#an#} mit {#ud#}) {#sa ta AtmA sarvAntaraH#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">14,6,5,1.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#aBivi#} {%durchathmen%}: {#antarikzaM hyeva vyanannaBivyaniti#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 4,1,2,27.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#sam#} {%aufathmen, zum Leben kommen%}: {#a\dyA ma\mAra\ sa hyaH samA^na#}
<ls>ṚV. 10,55,5.</ls>
<LEND>

<L>3171<pc>1-037-c<k1>an<k2>an<h>2 <hom>2.</hom> √{#an#}¦, {#a/nati#} und {#a/niti#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%athmen%} <ls n="Chr.">19,17</ls>. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%nach Luft schnappen, lechzen%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 *{%gehen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#apa#} {%ausathmen, aushauchen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#aByapa#} {%anathmen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#ava#} {%einathmen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#vyava#} {%dazwischen athmen%} <ls>MAITR. S. 4,7,7</ls>. <ls>TĀṆḌYA-BR. 7,1,9</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#udA#} ({#udAniti#} fehlerhaft für {#udaniti#}). <div n="p">— Mit {#ud#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%hinaufathmen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%ausathmen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#aByud#} {%anathmen, anhauchen%}. <div n="p">— Mit *{#parA#} und *{#pari#}. <div n="p">— Mit {#pra#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%einathmen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%athmen%} <ls n="Chr.">32,2</ls>. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%leben%}. <div n="1">— 4〉 {%wehen%}. <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> {%athmen machen, beleben%}. — {#prARita#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%am Leben erhalten%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%beseelt, von Verlangen erfüllt Etwas zu thun%} (<ab>Inf.</ab>). <div n="p">— Mit {#anupra#} {%nachathmen, hinterher athmen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#aBipra#} {%einathmen; beeinathmen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#vi#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%athmen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%den Athem durch den Körper durchathmen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#aBivi#} {%behauchen, durchathmen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#sam#} {%athmen, leben%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#anusam#} {%darnach athmen%} <ls>AIT. BR. 4,30</ls>. <LEND>

<L>1130<pc>0054-c<k1>an<k2>an {#an#}¦ {c2c} <ab>P.</ab> [{#aniti, Ana-nI-t, Ana, anituM#}, {#anita#}] {@1@} To breathe; {#AnIdavAtaM#} <lbinfo n="sva#DayA"/> {#svaDayA tadekaM#} <ls>Rv. 10. 129. 2.</ls> {@--2@} To move, go about, live; {#ko hyevAnyAt yadyeza#} {#AkASa AnaMdo na syAt#} <ls>T. Up.</ls> {@--3@} To gasp, pant with thirst (<ab>Ved.</ab>) {%--<ab>Caus.</ab>%} {#Anayati#}; {%<ab>desid.</ab>%} {#aninizati#}. -- (4 A.) To live. <LEND>

<L>392<pc>0050<k1>an<k2>an {@√an@}¦ [<ls>Cu. 〔419〕</ls>], {%athmen%}. <div n="Pf">Mit {@ápa,@} {%aushauchen, den letzten Athemzug thun%}. <div n="Pf">{@prá@} 1〉 {%zu athmen beginnen,%} <ab>vgl.</ab> prāṇā; 2〉 <ab>part.</ab> <ab>n.</ab>, {%das Beseelte%}. <div n="Pf">{@sám,@} {%athmen, leben%}. <div n="H">Stamm {@án:@} <div n="TS">-niti {@pra@} 1〉 yás pra‿áṇiti {951,4}. <div n="H"><ab>Imperf.</ab> {@ā́n@} (tonlos {858,8}): <div n="TS">-nīt avātám tád ékam {955,2}. — {@prá@} 1〉 adyá‿íd {858,8}. <div n="H"><ab>Perf.</ab> {@ān:@} <div n="TS">-na [<per>3.</per> <ab>s.</ab>] {@sám@} {881,5} adyā́ mamāra sá hiás 〰. <div n="H"><ab>Part.</ab> {@anát:@} <div n="TS">-át [<ab>n.</ab>] {164,30} turágātu jīvám. <div n="TS">-atás [<ab>G.</ab>] {@pra@}‿ [prāṇatás]; 2〉 rā́jā {947,3} (neben nimiṣatás, jágatas). <div n="TS">-atī́ [<ab>N.</ab> <ab>s.</ab> <ab>f.</ab>] {@apa@} (uṣā́s) {1015,2} asyá (sū́ryasya) prāṇā́t 〰. <LEND>
<L>241<pc>019<k1>an<k2>an √an aniti, anati <div n="1"/>1 <lang n="czech">dýchati</lang> <div n="1"/>2 <lang n="russian">дышать</lang> <div n="1"/>3 <lang n="english">to breathe</lang> <LEND>
